name: COVID-19 Open Research Dataset (CORD-19)
description: The COVID-19 Open Research Dataset (CORD-19) is a free resource of scholarly articles, including full text content, about COVID-19 and the coronavirus family of viruses. It was prepared by the Allen Institute for AI and partner research groups to support text mining, information retrieval, and other research on COVID-19.
measurementTechnique: Text mining corpus aggregation from scholarly literature sources
